summary: All systems operational. No secrets or data leaks; JS syntax valid; all core features present. 2 low-severity code-quality advisories (swallowed catches, innerHTML usage) to review when convenient.

liveSite.appNote: https://aravindramesh2806.github.io/wedding-planner/ served full app HTML (last weekly check, Mon 2026-06-22).
liveSite.supabaseNote: auth/v1/health responded without error (last weekly check, Mon 2026-06-22).
liveSite.note: Code-only scan today (Tue). Live app + Supabase deep check runs weekly on Mondays; values carried over from the 2026-06-22 check.

findings.title: No service-role or secret keys in client code
findings.detail: Scanned for sb_secret_, service_role, SUPABASE_SERVICE, private keys, sk_live_, ghp_, and AWS AKIA keys. None present.

findings.title: Only the browser-safe publishable key is shipped
findings.detail: 1 sb_publishable_ key found — public by design; access gated by Supabase RLS + SECURITY DEFINER RPCs.

findings.title: No debug logging of user data
findings.detail: 0 console.log/debug/info, 3 console.warn (error-handling only, no PII printed), 0 console.error.

findings.title: Guest/plan data stored in browser localStorage (by design)
findings.detail: 8 localStorage uses power local-only mode. Expected; data stays on the user's device.

findings.title: 25 empty / swallowed catch blocks
findings.detail: Errors caught and silently ignored (up from 23 last scan). Fine for non-critical paths but can hide real failures e.g. failed cloud saves. Consider logging or surfacing the important ones.

findings.title: 63 innerHTML assignments — keep user text escaped
findings.detail: innerHTML is an XSS surface. Confirm guest names, RSVP notes, and any user-entered text are escaped before insertion. Static template literals/SVG are safe.

findings.title: JavaScript syntax valid
findings.detail: node --check passed on both inline scripts (149KB + 141B).

findings.title: Cloud sync RPCs present
findings.detail: wp_signup, wp_load, wp_save, wp_admin_list all referenced.

findings.title: Planner modules present
findings.detail: checklist, budget, guest, rsvp, countdown, theme all detected in code.
